source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
In the middle of the big diagram one piece is missing and should be replaced. You are only allowed to do this by connecting light-grey lines with light-grey lines, dark-grey lines with dark-grey lines and black lines with black lines. Which piece fits?
<image1>
<image2>

requires_image=true and text_dominant=false indicate the task cannot be solved from text alone

multi_step: solving requires checking multiple constraints at once: line continuity and line-color matching

however, no explicit arithmetic or long chain reasoning is stated, so the score is kept moderate rather than maximal

this makes downstream checking feasible in principle by inspecting whether option B satisfies the visual constraints
